description: GO decision table artifact (CSV to /tmp, figure auto-saved)
code:
import pandas as pd, matplotlib.pyplot as plt, os
rows=[
 ["GO:0008106","alcohol dehydrogenase (NADP+) activity","MF","BioReason predicted",
  "Weakly/partially supported","Generalize / keep only as low-conf ISS",
  "SDR fold+NADP signature fit broad class; no assay; less precise than GO:0016616 already curated"],
 ["arabitol metabolic process","(seed cited GO:0019677='NAD+ catabolic process')","BP","BioReason predicted",
  "Refuted / defective","Do NOT add",
  "No substrate evidence; ortholog=sorbose/fructose; DCXR subfam=xylulose/xylitol; GO:0051161 OBSOLETE; GO ID mis-cited"],
 ["GO:0016616","oxidoreductase, CH-OH donor, NAD/NADP acceptor","MF","PomBase ISS/IEA","Retain",
  "Keep as best-supported MF","Matches fold+cofactor; conservative; already curated"],
 ["GO:0032115","sorbose reductase activity","MF","PomBase ISS(ortholog)","Disfavored",
  "Retain only w/ CAUTION","S.pombe cannot assimilate L-sorbose (PMID 31132130)"],
 ["GO:0050085","mannitol 2-dehydrogenase (NADP+) activity","MF","PomBase ISS","Uncertain",
  "Keep as low-conf prediction","From ortholog fructose->mannitol side-activity; unproven"],
 ["GO:0005739","mitochondrion","CC","PomBase predicted","Uncertain",
  "Keep as predicted","Localization not experimentally confirmed"],
]
df=pd.DataFrame(rows,columns=["GO_ID/term","Label","Aspect","Source","Verdict","Curation_action","Rationale"])
try:
    df.to_csv("/tmp/sou1_GO_decision_table.csv",index=False); print("CSV saved to /tmp")
except Exception as e: print("csv err",e)
print(df.to_string(index=False))
fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(16,3.4)); ax.axis('off')
t=ax.table(cellText=df.values,colLabels=df.columns,loc='center',cellLoc='left')
t.auto_set_font_size(False); t.set_fontsize(7.8); t.scale(1,1.7)
cmap={"Weakly/partially supported":"#fff2cc","Refuted / defective":"#f4cccc","Retain":"#d9ead3",
      "Disfavored":"#fce5cd","Uncertain":"#efefef"}
for i,v in enumerate(df["Verdict"]): t[(i+1,4)].set_facecolor(cmap.get(v,"#ffffff"))
ax.set_title("sou1 / SPAC8E11.10 (Q9Y6Z9) — GO decision table (leads require curator verification)",fontweight='bold')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.savefig("sou1_GO_decision_table.png",dpi=140,bbox_inches='tight')
print("saved figure")
